ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "category1" TEXT /* Primary category of the appliance sold */,
  "category2" TEXT /* Secondary category of the appliance sold */,
  "category3" TEXT /* Tertiary category of the appliance sold */,
  "maker" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the appliance */,
  "sales_amount" REAL /* Total sales amount for the transaction */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Unique identifier for tracking the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer who made the purchase */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the store where the sale occurred */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the salesperson who made the sale */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the transaction */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Total discount amount applied to the sale */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Total tax amount for the sale */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the transaction */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_category1 FOREIGN KEY ("category1") REFERENCES categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_maker FOREIGN KEY ("maker") REFERENCES makers ("maker_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "parent_category" TEXT /* Parent category for hierarchical categorization (if applicable) */,
  "category_level" INTEGER /* Level of the category (1 for primary, 2 for secondary, etc.) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "makers" (
  "maker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "maker_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the manufacturer */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the manufacturer */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the appliance sold */,
  "maker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the appliance sold */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the sale occurred */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the salesperson who made the sale */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the category */,
  "total_transactions" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions for the category */,
  "summary_date" TEXT /* Date for which the summary is generated */,
  "average_sale_amount" REAL /* Average sale amount for the category */,
  "total_discount_amount" REAL /* Total discount amount for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_summary_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_summary_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_summary_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_summary_maker_id FOREIGN KEY ("maker_id") REFERENCES makers ("maker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Customer's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Customer's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "store_address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "store_manager" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salespeople" (
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salesperson */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Salesperson's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Salesperson's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Salesperson's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Salesperson's phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salesperson_id")
)
